name: What happens if workers comp denies my claim in North Salt Lake?
description: Appeal within 30 days to hearing; get lawyer.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: What happens if workers comp denies my claim in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 30 days to hearing; get lawyer.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Request hearing within 30 days before administrative judge.[1][4] Prepare testimony on incident, symptoms, duties.[4] Key factors: witnesses, cross-exam; attorney files motions. Appeal quickly.[1] Many denials overturned with evidence.
